info.description: Course modules (lessons) shown to anyone who has purchased REGULATED. Listed in sort_order on /the-work/regulated/access. Each module can be text-only, video, audio, downloadable, or any combination — fields are all optional except title + sort_order. Modules are MEMBER-ONLY — they are NOT publicly readable; the access page fetches them server-side using the admin token.

title.description: Module heading shown to members. E.g. 'Module 1: Coming Home to Your Body'.

slug.description: URL slug — used if/when we add module detail pages. Auto-generates from title.

sort_order.description: Lower numbers appear first. Use 10, 20, 30 for the first three so you can insert later modules between (e.g. 15) without renumbering everything.

intro.description: Short intro sentence shown under the title in the module list. Optional.

body.description: Main lesson content — markdown supported. Use for any module that is text-led (essay, written practice, instructions).

video_url.description: URL of the video lesson. YouTube unlisted, Vimeo, or any embeddable provider. Leave blank for non-video modules.

audio_url.description: URL of the audio lesson (Bunny.net, podcast host, or direct MP3). Renders as an audio player. Leave blank if no audio.

downloadable_file.description: Optional PDF, worksheet, or audio file customers can download. Upload once, shows as a download button on the module.

thumbnail.description: Optional thumbnail shown next to the module title in the list. Recommend 800x600 or similar.

duration_label.description: Optional readable duration, e.g. '12 minutes' or '15 min audio + worksheet'. Shown as a small caption.

is_intro.description: Tick ONE module as the introduction. It gets highlighted at the top of the access page. Leave the rest unticked.
